context.audience: Product developers replacing traditional search with AI-powered alternatives, SaaS builders adding intelligent search to their applications, developers implementing internal knowledge base search
pain_points: Balancing search relevance between keyword matching and semantic understanding
Latency requirements for real-time search versus background AI processing
Indexing and re-indexing strategies for large and frequently updated content
Search result ranking that combines vector similarity with business logic
Building a search UI that handles different result types and confidence levels
